葷食咖哩 NON VEG. CURRIES
 回
245
 旁遮普奶油雞肉咖哩
Punjabi Butter Chicken
 碳烤去骨雞肉和蕃茄、堅果、奶油咖哩燉製而成
Roasted tandoori chicken tikka cooked in rich tomato, cashewnut and
butter curry
回
 Chicken Tikka Masala
 245
香料雞腿肉瑪沙拉  去骨雞肉於坦都烤爐中烤後,炒入濃郁的香料瑪沙拉中
London's favorite boneless roasted chicken tossed with peppers
and mixed hot spices
 回
260
 旁遮普菠菜雞肉咖哩
Punjabi Palak Chicken
 去骨雞肉以旁遮普方式的菠菜咖哩煮成,加入大蒜、辣椒....等香料小火燉製
Boneless chicken cooked in Punjabi style spinach curry,
tempered with garlic and red chili flakes
果阿雞肉咖哩力 Goan Chicken Vindaloo
回 295
以果阿地區方式將去骨雞肉烹煮於辛香料中,呈現酸、辣風味咖哩
Boneless chicken thigh cooked in hot goan style sour and spicy curry.
15
 295
 Karahi Chicken
 回
 卡岱香料雞瑪沙拉  雞肉和胡椒... 等多種香料,再以卡方式做成的瑪沙拉咖哩
Chicken cooked with peppers & special karahi masala
 。
265
 南印鯛魚咖哩
Andhra Fish Curry
 鯛魚片和洋蔥、蕃茄、咖哩葉及香料燉製成安德拉風味咖哩
Tilapia fish fillet cooked with onions, tomatoes, curry leaves in Andhra style

 295
